name: Network Profile
description: Document model for managing network profile information including social media links and branding.

global.schema:
type NetworkProfileState {
  name: String!
  icon: String!
  darkThemeIcon: String!
  logo: String!
  darkThemeLogo: String!
  logoBig: String!
  website: String
  description: String!
  category: [NetworkCategory!]!
  x: String
  github: String
  discord: String
  youtube: String
}

enum NetworkCategory {
  DEFI
  OSS
  CRYPTO
  NGO
  CHARITY
}

modules.name: network-profile-management

operations.name: SET_ICON
operations.reducer:
if (action.input.icon) state.icon = action.input.icon;
if (action.input.darkThemeIcon !== undefined) state.darkThemeIcon = action.input.darkThemeIcon || "";
operations.template: Sets the icon for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the icon for the network profile

operations.name: SET_LOGO
operations.reducer:
if (action.input.logo) state.logo = action.input.logo;
if (action.input.darkThemeLogo !== undefined) state.darkThemeLogo = action.input.darkThemeLogo || "";
operations.template: Sets the logo for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the logo for the network profile

operations.name: SET_LOGO_BIG
operations.template: Sets the big logo for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the big logo for the network profile

operations.name: SET_WEBSITE
operations.template: Sets the website URL for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the website URL for the network profile

operations.name: SET_DESCRIPTION
operations.template: Sets the description for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the description for the network profile

operations.name: SET_CATEGORY
operations.template: Sets the category for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the category for the network profile

operations.name: SET_X
operations.template: Sets the X (Twitter) handle for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the X (Twitter) handle for the network profile

operations.name: SET_GITHUB
operations.template: Sets the GitHub username for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the GitHub username for the network profile

operations.name: SET_DISCORD
operations.template: Sets the Discord invite or username for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the Discord invite or username for the network profile

operations.name: SET_YOUTUBE
operations.template: Sets the YouTube channel for the network profile
operations.description: Sets the YouTube channel for the network profile

operations.name: SET_PROFILE_NAME
operations.template: Sets the name of the network profile
operations.description: Sets the name of the network profile

modules.description: Operations for managing network profile information including basic details and social media links
